briefdescription.para: Value to be written in JCONFIG Register.
This buffer is used to store commands which extend across 32K boundaries.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the register

briefdescription.para: This function writes 32-bit value to 32-bit register.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the register
is the value to store in register
is the address of the register

briefdescription.para: This function reads an 8-bit value from a 64-bit register.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the register

briefdescription.para: This function disables waking up of PPU1 processor.
This function writes 32-bit value to 64-bit register.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the register
is the value to store in register

briefdescription.para: This function writes 8-bit value to 64-bit register.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the register
is the value to store in register
